h1: Mobile Locksmith Serving Magnet Cove, Arkansas
heroSub: We bring the locksmith shop to your driveway, barn, or storefront in Magnet Cove — from Harver Hills Road to Gourdneck Valley Road. Real local help, day or night, no national call center.

sections.html:
A Locksmith Who Drives Out to Magnet Cove

Magnet Cove sits southeast of Hot Springs in Hot Spring County, tucked into the Ouachita Mountains along Arkansas Highway 51 just north of U.S. Highway 270. The community fills a narrow valley — the “cove” itself — that runs along Stone Quarry Creek and is ringed by mineral-rich hills. This is the famous spot where magnetite, lodestone, and dozens of rare minerals show up in the ground, and it gives the area its name and its character: rural, spread out, and full of family farms, long gravel drives, and small shops along the highway.

That is exactly the kind of place where a fully mobile locksmith makes the most sense. There is no storefront in the cove to drive to, so we come to you instead. Arkey Locksmith is locally owned, and we know these back roads — from the school and church at the center of the community out to the county roads on either end. When you call (501) 617-8872 you reach a real person, not a far-off dispatch center. We load the van with the tools and key blanks for your job and head your way.

What We Handle for Magnet Cove Homes, Farms & Shops

Rural living means more locks to keep track of — the house, the shop, the equipment shed, plus a truck or two in the driveway. We cover all of it in one trip so you are not hauling locks into Malvern or Hot Springs.

Lockouts

Locked out of the house, the truck, or the shop? We get you back in without damage and without a long wait, even on a back road.

Car Keys & Fobs

Lost truck keys or a dead fob? We cut and program car keys, fobs, transponder keys, and smart keys on-site for far less than the dealership.

Rekey & New Locks

New to a property or had a worker move on? We rekey or replace locks on homes, rentals, barns, sheds, and shop doors.

We also handle commercial work and access control for the shops and small businesses along the Highway 51 and 270 corridor. One thing we do not do is safe work — for everything else with a lock or key, we are your local call.

Neighborhoods & Areas We Cover in Magnet Cove

Magnet Cove stretches along Highway 51, and our service area runs the full length of the community and out into the surrounding parts of Hot Spring County. We come to you anywhere around:

  • The Highway 51 corridor through the heart of the cove, near Magnet Cove School and Magnet Cove United Methodist Church
  • Harver Hills Road on the southeast end and Gourdneck Valley Road on the northwest end
  • The U.S. Highway 270 corridor running east toward Malvern and west toward Hot Springs
  • Jones Mills and the area around the Highway 51 quarry to the north
  • The Rockport area and the farms, homesteads, and rural drives in between

If your address is a long gravel drive or hard to find on a map, that is normal for us — just give clear directions when you call (501) 617-8872 and we will find you.

Local Calls We Get Out Here

A rural valley like Magnet Cove brings its own kind of lock and key needs, and we have seen most of them over 15-plus years on the road. Folks here often have more than one building to secure — a main house, a shop, a barn, maybe a rental on the same land — so a single visit that handles all the keys at once saves a lot of back-and-forth.

We get plenty of calls from people who just bought a place out here and want every lock rekeyed to one new key. We get farmers and tradespeople who broke or lost the only key to a work truck. We help retirees and longtime residents who want their doors made easier to use or simply safer. And because the cove is quiet country, a late-night lockout on a dark road can feel a long way from help — which is exactly why we answer 24/7 and give you an honest arrival time before we roll.

Why Local Matters Out Here

  • We know the Highway 51 and 270 corridors and the county roads around Magnet Cove, so we find you fast.
  • One mobile visit can cover the house, a vehicle, and the shop — no hauling locks into town.
  • Veteran and senior discounts for our neighbors.
  • Licensed and insured, with 15+ years of hands-on locksmith work.
  • Car keys, fobs, transponder keys, and smart-key programming done right in your driveway.
  • 24/7 help — a 2 a.m. lockout on a dark country road still gets a real answer.

Call (501) 617-8872 for a quote. Pricing varies by job, but we keep it affordable and tell you what to expect before we start.

faqs.q: Do you really serve Magnet Cove?
faqs.a: Yes. Magnet Cove is part of our regular service area in Hot Spring County. We are fully mobile and drive out along Highway 51 and Highway 270 to homes, farms, and shops throughout the cove — from Harver Hills Road to Gourdneck Valley Road and out toward Jones Mills.

faqs.q: How long until you get to me?
faqs.a: Because Magnet Cove is rural and sits between Hot Springs and Malvern, drive time depends on exactly where you are and on traffic. Call (501) 617-8872 and we will give you an honest arrival estimate before we head out.

faqs.q: Can you make a car key or fob at my place?
faqs.a: Yes. We cut and program car keys, fobs, transponder keys, and smart keys right in your driveway. It costs far less than the dealership, and there is no tow into town.

faqs.q: Can you rekey my home or business?
faqs.a: We can. We rekey or replace locks on houses, rentals, barns, sheds, and shop doors. If you just bought a property in the cove or had someone move out, rekeying every lock to one new key is a fast, affordable way to control who has access.

faqs.q: Do you handle locks for shops and small businesses?
faqs.a: Yes. We do commercial lock work and access control for the shops and businesses along the Highway 51 and 270 corridor — rekeys, lock changes, master keys, and electronic entry. We do not service safes, but for doors, keys, and access we have you covered.

faqs.q: Will you actually come out to a rural address?
faqs.a: Yes. Being fully mobile is the whole point. Long gravel drives and out-of-the-way addresses are normal for us — just give clear directions when you call (501) 617-8872 and we will get to you.
